steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
From $\frac{x}{y} = 4$, we get $x = 4y$. Substitute into the second equation:
$$\frac{3(4y)}{ty} = 24 \implies \frac{12y}{ty} = 24 \implies \frac{12}{t} = 24$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above confirms A, $\frac{1}{2}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
